acceptance_criteria.criterion: Every supervised_local_service command path for the cognovis-tools entry in library.yaml references the installer-derived per-mcp deploy path, with no remaining references to the shared deploy clone in that block.
python3 scripts/validate-library.py passes after the edit.
A validator test asserts the cognovis-tools supervised_local_service command paths equal the path computed by mcp_installer.py:_derive_deploy_path.

commits.message: test(CL-hqaj): red - assert catalog supervised paths match installer deploy path
fix(CL-hqaj): green - repoint cognovis-tools supervised_local_service args at installer-derived per-mcp deploy path

tests.command: HOME=/private/tmp/clhqaj-home PYTHONPATH=/Users/malte/code/library/meta/.claude/worktrees/bead-CL-hqaj/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache-clhqaj uv run pytest tests/test_mcp_deploy_clone.py -q

downstream_impacts: The cognovis-tools supervised daemon lifecycle commands now resolve to the dedicated per-mcp deploy clone instead of the shared cognovis-library-core clone.
The deploy-clone regression test now fails when the catalog path drifts from the installer-derived supervised project path.
